name: 测试猫爬架模板

parsed_knowledge.summary: 关于猫爬架(Cat Tree/Cat Tower)亚马逊Listing图片生成的规范文档，涵盖全局一致性要求、场景布置规则、反向提示词以及详细的图像质检清单。
global_rules: Keep the product structure, proportion, color, material and functional parts consistent
Do not redesign the product appearance
White background images must show the complete product
Scene images must show the product in a real home environment
scene_rules: Place against a wall, with a visible window nearby
Modern American residential living room style
Can include cat interaction but do not obstruct core structure
negative_prompts: Do not change the product material
Do not change the product structure
Do not let cats obstruct the core structure
checklist: Product main structure is complete and identifiable
Color and material match the original
Functional parts (cat house, hammock, scratching post) clearly visible
